---
title: Data Preparation
subtitle: including download or any preprocessing
description: A short description
author:
 - name: Pukar Bhandari
   email: pukar.bhandari@wfrc.utah.gov
   affiliation:
     - name: Wasatch Front Regional Council
       url: "https://wfrc.utah.gov/"
date: "2026-03-13"
---

##  Setup Environment

### Import Libraries

```{python}
import sys
from pathlib import Path

import pandas as pd
import geopandas as gpd

from dotenv import load_dotenv
import os

from arcgis.gis import GIS

# Add project root to path so _src can be imported
sys.path.insert(0, str(Path.cwd()))
from _src.arcgis_utils import fetch_feature_layer
```

### Filepath Configuration

```{python}
config_filepath = {
    "out_centerlines": Path("_data/raw/UtahRoads.gpkg"),
    "out_network_links": Path("_data/raw/WFv1000_MasterNet - Link.gpkg"),
    "out_network_nodes": Path("_data/raw/WFv1000_MasterNet - Node.gpkg"),
}
```

### ArcGIS Connections

```{python}
# Anonymous connection for public layers
gis_anon = GIS()
```

```{python}
# | eval: false
# | echo: false

# Load project-level .env file
load_dotenv()

# Authenticated connection for private layers
gis_auth = GIS(
    url=os.getenv("ARCGIS_URL"),
    username=os.getenv("ARCGIS_USERNAME"),
    password=os.getenv("ARCGIS_PASSWORD"),
)
print(f"Logged in as: {gis_auth.properties.user.username}")
```

## Download and Store Data

### Roadway Centerlines

```{python}
out_path = config_filepath["out_centerlines"]

if not out_path.exists():
    gdf_centerlines = fetch_feature_layer(
        service_url="https://services1.arcgis.com/99lidPhWCzftIe9K/ArcGIS/rest/services/UtahRoads/FeatureServer/0",
        gis=gis_anon,
    )
    out_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    gdf_centerlines.to_file(out_path, driver="GPKG")
    print(f"Saved to: {out_path}")
else:
    print(f"File already exists, skipping download: {out_path}")
```

### Network Links

```{python}
out_path = config_filepath["out_network_links"]

if not out_path.exists():
    gdf_links = fetch_feature_layer(
        service_url="https://services1.arcgis.com/taguadKoI1XFwivx/arcgis/rest/services/WFv1000_MasterNet_20250821___Link/FeatureServer/0",
        gis=gis_anon,
    )
    out_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    gdf_links.to_file(out_path, driver="GPKG")
    print(f"Saved to: {out_path}")
else:
    print(f"File already exists, skipping download: {out_path}")
```

### Network Nodes

```{python}
out_path = config_filepath["out_network_nodes"]

if not out_path.exists():
    gdf_nodes = fetch_feature_layer(
        service_url="https://services1.arcgis.com/taguadKoI1XFwivx/arcgis/rest/services/WFv1000_MasterNet_20250821___Node/FeatureServer/0",
        gis=gis_anon,
    )
    out_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    gdf_nodes.to_file(out_path, driver="GPKG")
    print(f"Saved to: {out_path}")
else:
    print(f"File already exists, skipping download: {out_path}")
```
